sections.paragraph:
to shut, to close up, to stop, e.g. the mouth, the ears, Pro 17:28 21:13 חַלֹּונֹות אֲטֻמֹות, Eze 40:16 41:16 , 26 Eze 41:26, “closed windows, with shut lattices,” the bars of which being let into the wall and planks, could not be opened and shut at pleasure. LXX. θυρίδες δικτυωταί. Symm. τοξικαί. Comp. 1 K. 6:4 . Comp. Arab. أَطِمَ, to put a curtain over a window.

Hiphil id., Psa 58:5.
